statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); dir=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|^$HOME|~|"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); ctx_size_raw=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.context_window_size // 0'); ctx_size_k=$((ctx_size_raw / 1000)); remaining_raw=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); context_info=""; if [ -n "$remaining_raw" ]; then rem_int=${remaining_raw%.*}; used=$((100 - rem_int)); filled=$((used * 10 / 100)); empty=$((10 - filled)); bar_filled=$(printf '%*s' "$filled" '' | tr ' ' '█'); bar_empty=$(printf '%*s' "$empty" '' | tr ' ' '░'); context_info=$(printf " \033[1;32m%s\033[2;32m%s\033[0m \033[2;32m%s%%\033[0m" "$bar_filled" "$bar_empty" "$used"); fi; in_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); out_tok=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); in_k=$((in_tok / 1000)); out_k=$((out_tok / 1000)); token_info=$(printf " \033[2;33m%sk/%sk\033[0m" "$in_k" "$out_k"); cost_raw=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0'); cost_fmt=$(printf '%.1f' "$cost_raw"); cost_info=$(printf " \033[2;33m$%s\033[0m" "$cost_fmt"); git_info=""; if git -C "$cwd" rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); dirty=""; if [ -n "$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ]; then dirty='*'; fi; ahead=0; behind=0; ab=$(git -C "$cwd" --no-optional-locks rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...@{upstream} 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ab" ]; then ahead=$(echo "$ab" | cut -f1); behind=$(echo "$ab" | cut -f2); fi; ab_info=""; if [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then ab_info=$(printf ' ↑%s↓%s' "$ahead" "$behind"); elif [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then ab_info=$(printf ' ↑%s' "$ahead"); elif [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null; then ab_info=$(printf ' ↓%s' "$behind"); fi; git_info=$(printf " \033[2;36mon %s%s%s\033[0m" "$branch" "$dirty" "$ab_info"); fi; printf "\033[2;32m%s (%sk)\033[0m%s%s%s %s%s" "$model" "$ctx_size_k" "$context_info" "$token_info" "$cost_info" "$dir" "$git_info"
